hero.title: PDF to ODT
hero.subtitle: Convert PDFs into ODT editable documents.

about_formats: ODT is editable in LibreOffice and OpenOffice.
Use ODT when you need editable documents on open office suites.
common_problems: Complex layouts may need manual cleanup
tips: Use OCR-enabled PDFs for best results

faq.question: Can I edit after conversion?
faq.answer: Yes — ODT is editable in LibreOffice and OpenOffice.
